source_text.quote: recognition from and awards by Government in the Dasa of the lord of the 10th

all_of: The Mahadasha of the 10th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The fundamental planetary period for achieving professional recognition, authority, government honors, and major career ascension is during the Mahadasha of the 10th house lord.

notes: Baseline rule for establishing institutional power and executive rise in Vimshottari Dasha.

source_text.quote: There will be acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of a high position in Government) in the Dasha of the lords of the Ascendant and 10th, if the lord of the 10th be in the Ascendant and the lord of the Ascendant be in the 10th.

all_of: The 1st Lord is positioned in the 10th house
The 10th Lord is positioned in the 1st house
any_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 1st Lord is active
The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 10th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: A powerful Parivartana Yoga (mutual exchange) between the self (1st) and career/karma (10th) triggers major professional ascension, leadership, and executive power during the planetary periods of either involved lord.

notes: Classic combination for achieving high public office or organizational control.

source_text.work_name: Nakshatras as Celestial Blueprints: An Analytical Study of Lunar Mansions in Predicting Major Life Events
source_text.quote: Shodashottari Dasha (116-Year Cycle)... Native born during the day, and the Ascendant (Lagna) Lord is highly powerful. Career advancement, executive leadership, and government-related achievements.

all_of: The native was born during the day
The Ascendant (Lagna) Lord is highly powerful
The Shodashottari Dasha system is being applied

interpretation.meaning: When a native is born during the daytime and has a strong Lagna Lord, the conditional Shodashottari Dasha system becomes highly active and specific for timing executive leadership, promotions, and the attainment of institutional power.

notes: A conditional Dasha system rule where the entire 116-year framework is oriented towards authority and career achievements.

source_text.quote: Effects like acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of a high position in government)... attainment of the position of a commander of the army... will be derived in the Antardasa of Saturn in the Dasa of Saturn, if Saturn be in his own sign, in his sign of exaltation or in deep exaltation, or be in Kendra or Trikona from the Ascendant, or be a yoga-karaka.

any_of: Saturn is in its own sign (Capricorn, Aquarius)
Saturn is a Yogakaraka for the Ascendant

interpretation.meaning: A structurally strong Saturn (the natural significator of duty, karma, and career) brings immense professional elevation, leadership roles, and executive authority during the overlapping window of its own Mahadasha and Antardasha.

notes: Requires Saturn to be functionally and positionally strong to bestow high-level command and influence.

source_text.quote: acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of high position in government), enjoyments by the beneficence of the king (government), honours... will be derived in the Antardasa of Venus in the Dasa of Saturn; if Venus be in Kendra, Trikona or the 11th associated with or aspected by benefices.

any_of: Venus is positioned in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th)
Venus is positioned in a Trikona (5th, 9th)
Venus is positioned in the 11th house

interpretation.meaning: The notoriously powerful Saturn-Venus Dasha period brings exceptional career rise, institutional power, and professional honors, provided Venus is well-placed and free from severe affliction.

notes: One of the most highly regarded mutual dasha periods for organizational influence and executive success.

source_text.quote: Sun-Mercury-Feeding from the king's kitchen, acquisition of Chhatra and Chamar with royal symbols, attainment of the position of a high dignitary of government.

interpretation.meaning: The combination of the Sun (signifying authority and state power) and Mercury (signifying intellect, communication, and administration) in the Dasha sequence elevates the native to high administrative positions, advisory roles, and bureaucratic power.

notes: A specific period signaling a rise to a high dignitary or prominent executive/administrative post.

source_text.quote: Sun-Jupiter-Recognition by government, respected by government employees, becoming favourite of the king.

interpretation.meaning: The overlapping periods of the two primary planets of dharma, wisdom, and authority (Sun and Jupiter) generate strong institutional recognition, respect from subordinates/employees, and major promotions or favors from higher-ups.

notes: An excellent period for consolidating career authority and gaining the trust of institutional leadership.

source_text.quote: Effects like acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of high position in government)... attainment of the position of a commander of the army... in the Antardasa of Saturn in the Dasa of Jupiter, if Saturn be in his sign of exaltation, in his own sign, kendra or trikona endowed with strength.

any_of: Saturn is in its sign of exaltation (Libra)
Saturn is in its own sign (Capricorn or Aquarius)
Saturn is positioned in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th)
Saturn is positioned in a Trikona (5th, 9th)

interpretation.meaning: During the expansive Jupiter period, the sub-period of a powerfully placed Saturn bestows high-level command, significant institutional power, and executive leadership positions within organizations or government.

notes: Combines Jupiter's blessings with Saturn's structural authority when Saturn holds high dignity.

source_text.quote: attainment of the position of a commander of the army... will be the very auspicious results if Mercury be in kendra, trikona or in his sign of exaltation from the lord of the Dasa (Mars).

any_of: Mercury is positioned in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) from Mars
Mercury is positioned in a Trikona (5th, 9th) from Mars
Mercury is in its sign of exaltation (Virgo) from Mars

interpretation.meaning: When Mercury operates as the Antardasha lord and is placed in a strong geometric angle (Dasha Pravesh) relative to the Mahadasha lord Mars, it triggers a phase of tactical leadership, administrative command, and strategic authority.

notes: Demonstrates the power of mutually well-placed Dasha lords in activating executive control and strategic positions.

source_text.quote: Effects like gain of position... acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of a high position in government), enthusiasm, cordial relations with the king (government)... will be derived in the Antardasa of Rahu in the Dasa of Rahu, if Rahu be in Cancer, Scorpio, Virgo or Sagittarius and be in the 3rd, the 6th, the 10th or the 11th from the Ascendant, or be associated with yogakaraka planet in his sign of exaltation.

any_of: Rahu is in Cancer, Scorpio, Virgo, or Sagittarius AND is positioned in the 3rd, 6th, 10th, or 11th house from the Ascendant
Rahu is associated with a Yogakaraka planet that is in its sign of exaltation

interpretation.meaning: If Rahu is strongly placed in specific signs and Upachaya houses (3, 6, 10, 11), or conjunct an exalted Yogakaraka, the onset of its 18-year Mahadasha acts as a massive accelerator for career elevation, capturing institutional power, and forging powerful government relationships.

notes: Highlights Rahu's capability to deliver immense worldly power and status when placed in growth-oriented houses.
